context: Tests whether the ADAttributionKit skill gives precise advertised-app postback copy and re-engagement setup guidance. The scorer should evaluate only the generated postback copy setup file.

checklist.name: Top dictionary
checklist.description: Shows the advertised app keys nested under a top-level AdAttributionKit Info.plist dictionary.

checklist.name: Copy endpoint key
checklist.description: Includes the AttributionCopyEndpoint key with an HTTPS URL value.

checklist.name: Reengagement copy key
checklist.description: Includes OptInForReengagementPostbackCopies as a Boolean opt-in for re-engagement postback copies.

checklist.name: Well-known path
checklist.description: States the server must accept HTTPS POST at /.well-known/appattribution/report-attribution/.

checklist.name: Registrable domain
checklist.description: States that the system derives the endpoint from the registrable domain and ignores subdomains.

checklist.name: Valid SSL
checklist.description: Mentions that the endpoint domain needs a valid SSL certificate.

checklist.name: First update
checklist.description: Recommends calling a conversion value update on first launch or as early as possible to start the conversion window.

checklist.name: Window summary
checklist.description: Summarizes the three postback windows as days 0-2, days 3-7, and days 8-35.

checklist.name: Delay summary
checklist.description: States the first postback delay is 24-48 hours and later postback delays are 24-144 hours.

checklist.name: JSON spelling
checklist.description: Uses the exact postback JSON conversion-type spelling re-engagement and distinguishes it from Swift API spelling such as .reengagement.
